location: On a corpse near tombstones in the Prison Town graveyard, at lava level inside Volcano Manor, Mt. Gelmir. From the Prison Town Church Site of Grace, exit and cross several rooftops (past a long-necked serpent) down to ground level, then continue to the graveyard.

source.name: Corpse in graveyard, Volcano Manor (Prison Town)

tactics: The route involves several sequential rooftop drops — go slowly, since a wrong drop can send you to a different part of Prison Town or near lava hazards.
It requires Strength, Dexterity, and Faith simultaneously, one of the few small shields with a triple-stat requirement.
Don't confuse it with the visually similar Man-Serpent's Shield, which drops from enemies elsewhere in the same dungeon rather than being a static ground pickup.
lore: A small shield said to be forged from lava that never fully cooled. Its lingering heat grants both an innate fire attack and resistance to frost and blood loss.

builds.name: Faith/fire hybrid off-hand
builds.why: Faith scaling drives both its physical and fire attack via elemental scaling, and its Shield Bash skill gives a Faith-based build an active fire option instead of pure blocking.
